grid.note: Node x/y are integer grid cells used by the fog-of-war map renderer. Origin (0,0) is top-left.

ravine_ledge.title: The Ravine Ledge
ravine_ledge.description: A ledge overlooks a citadel sunk deep into the earth. A sturdy rope, knotted at intervals, is tied to a leaning pillar and drops into the dark below.

tower_entry.title: The Tower Entry
tower_entry.description: The rope ends on the masonry floor of a round, roofless tower room. Rubble and old leaves cover the ground. Two giant rats startle from a nest in the debris.

dry_fountain.title: The Dry Fountain
dry_fountain.description: A cracked stone fountain dominates this chamber, long dry. Faded carvings of a thorned tree ring its basin. A dark passage continues south.

rat_warren.title: The Rat Warren
rat_warren.description: A low side-chamber packed with shredded nesting material. The stink is overwhelming. A lone giant rat guards a glint of metal in the muck.

goblin_guardpost.title: The Goblin Guardpost
goblin_guardpost.description: Crude barricades of broken furniture block half the room. A goblin sentry crouches behind them, scimitar drawn, eyes wide in the gloom.

twisted_grove.title: The Twisted Grove
twisted_grove.description: The passage opens into an impossible underground grove lit by pale luminescent fungus. A gnarled white tree stands at its centre. Two twig blights skitter from its roots to bar your way.
